goals.title: Complete LinkAtlas from the current repository state through docs/COD...
goals.objective: Complete LinkAtlas from the current repository state through docs/CODEX_EXECUTION_PLAN.md Task 03 to Task 11 as one durable aggregate. Task 00 docs move, Task 01 bootstrap, Task 02 SQLite storage, and Task 03 initial URL safety/IPC work already have commits on main and must be preserved. Continue with full article extraction/readability/sanitization, summarization/classification, embeddings/vector retrieval, RAG QA with evidence validation, browser extension share flow, UI states, packaging/update checks, and final release hardening. Do not mark this aggregate complete until Task 11 and the final quality gate pass. Respect docs/DESIGN.md, docs/CODEX_EXECUTION_PLAN.md, AGENTS.md architecture/security/testing rules, use pnpm TypeScript strict mode, commit and push meaningful units with Korean messages, and capture evidence for lint/typecheck/unit/integration/e2e plus manual UI/security QA.

successCriteria.scenario: End-to-end happy path: a user adds a supported public http/https URL; extraction creates sanitized article content and evidence blocks; local mocked/Ollama-compatible providers produce summary, tags, entities, links, and embeddings; vector search retrieves relevant blocks; RAG QA answers only from retrieved evidence with citations; renderer UI exposes document, search, and QA states.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: Implementation commits plus .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/final-C001-happy-path.txt containing pnpm lint, pnpm typecheck, pnpm test, pnpm test:integration, relevant e2e/manual smoke logs, and references to fixture-based extraction/model/search/QA proofs.

successCriteria.scenario: Security and malformed-input boundary path: unsupported schemes, localhost/private/link-local URLs, redirects to blocked networks, oversized responses, timeout responses, hostile HTML/prompt-injection fixtures, malformed model JSON, missing evidence IDs, empty search results, and renderer IPC abuse attempts all fail closed with stable error codes and no privileged renderer access.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/final-C002-security-boundaries.txt with unit/integration/e2e or manual proofs for URL validation, extraction sanitization, IPC Zod validation, prompt/schema validation, evidence-ID validation, and Electron security settings.

successCriteria.scenario: Regression and release path: existing Task 00-03 behavior remains working, migrations apply from empty DB without editing old migrations, package boundaries still hold, browser extension share flow reaches the app via secure IPC/API surface, packaging/update checks are documented or implemented per plan, and final quality gate has no unreviewed dirty changes.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/final-C003-regression-release.txt with migration tests, workspace lint/typecheck/test/integration/e2e logs, packaging/build or documented limitation evidence, git status/log, and final review notes.

codexObjective: Complete the durable ulw-loop plan in .omo/ulw-loop/E10191E7-97CE-4FD6-8C5F-3DC63CA62722/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omo/ulw-loop/E10191E7-97CE-4FD6-8C5F-3DC63CA62722/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.
